chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3084 & 3085 of 2012 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ D/O matter For hearing of CMA No. 16062/2025 (in C.P.No.D-3084/2012) For hearing of CMA No. 16060/2025 (in C.P.No.D-3085/2025) 10.09.2025 M/s Umair Nabi and Habibullah advocates for the petitioners Mr. Sandeep Malani AAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioners have filed restoration applications. These petitions were dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 29.05.2025, which is set up below for ease of reference. “Per learned counsel for respondent these petitions are pending since 2012 without any progress and are even otherwise not maintainable. They state that the matters have been perpetuated time and time again for more than 13 years by the petitioner. Be that as it may, even today brief is being held and adjournment being sought on behalf of petitioner’s counsel. Both petitions are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter.” We have heard learned counsel for the petitioners and have also considered the aforesaid order. We find there are no grounds for restoration of these petitions as the order dated 29.05.2025 clearly reflects the conduct of the petitioners in pursuing these petitions. Accordingly, restoration applications are dismissed. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the captioned connected petition. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
